calendar.matters:
First And Final Report Of Executor And Petition For Settlement And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Malkin, for petitioner Joan Rost.

Ms. Malkin stated that the petitioner had gotten word from Prudential that there was potentially an asset of the estate and that a probate of the estate was necessary to receive payment. Accordingly a probate was opened and Prudential sent a check in payment. It was then determined that the payment was not an asset of the estate, and the check has been returned. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

First And Final Report Of Executor And Petition For Settlement And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First And Final Report Of Executor And Petition For Settlement And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

First And Final Report Of Executor And Petition For Settlement And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Malkin (via court call) for (executor) Joan Rost.

The Court asked counsel if she would be able to file the amended petition within the next month or two. Ms. Malkin reported that there are no estate assets, that there was a lump sum which was given back to Prudential as it was a mistake and that it had been put into her trust account until they were able to verify that it needed to be returned. The Court stated that it has concerns as to what happened when they took possession of the check without the court's approval and that the court needs a copy of the letters that were issued. Ms. Malkin stated that letters were never issued. The Court stated that letters will need to be issued, that time will need to be given for the creditors claim period to lapse and that an amended petition with an accounting will need to be filed. The first and final report of executor and petition for settlement and close of estate was continued to July 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
